at_a_glance: You have spent $4.47 across 8 sessions, all on 2026-04-18. Phase 1 was the heaviest session at $1.30 — 11 tasks in one push. This session resolved the last hard architectural problem (ghost window race) by eliminating pillWin entirely and fixed 3 IDLE visual bugs, landing at $0.42. With 4 Phase 3 polish tasks left, the project is 91% done and well on track to finish under $5.

session_narratives.2026-04-18-001: The brainstorm-to-spec day — vibe-new-app, vibe-architect, and spec-review generated the full BRIEF, ARCHITECTURE, SPEC, and PLAN documents. Heavy output, three large planning tasks. $0.61.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-002: The biggest single session — all 9 Phase 1 tasks plus the Phase 1 review and vibe-parallel orchestration, built in one push. 11 tasks at $0.12 average each. $1.30.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-003: Feature planning session for the state machine (F-STATE) — vibe-add-feature generated the full FEATURE_TASKS.md and vibe-spec-review validated it. No build tasks completed. $0.47.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-004: F-STATE build — all 5 state machine tasks (FST-001 through FST-005) completed: JS foundation, DOM structure, CSS tokens, resize IPC, and boot wiring. $0.51.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-005: Feature planning for F-FIRST-RUN — vibe-add-feature generated the first-run spec, spec-review validated. Again no build tasks, pure planning overhead. $0.44.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-006: Short build session — just FRN-004 (checkFirstRunCompletion + IDLE transition) plus a vibe-cost run. Low token session at $0.20.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-007: Complete dark-glass visual redesign of index.html plus 6 production bug fixes covering traffic lights, window resize, transcript timing, waveform, and system prompts. $0.52.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-008: Architectural fix session — pillWin eliminated entirely (DECISION-004): removed show-pill/hide-pill IPC, deleted pill.html, moved RECORDING panel into main win with canvas waveform and timer. Then BUG-004 fixed vibrancy (sidebar→under-window + backgroundColor), stripped colored dot halos from traffic light spacers, and patched mode pill appearance. 5 tasks at $0.084 average. $0.42.

recommendations.title: No prompt caching — every session pays full input price
recommendations.body: All 8 sessions show 0 cache read tokens. CLAUDE.md is read on every turn and changes frequently (active feature specs appended after each feature), preventing it from being cached. With Phase 2 now complete, the three active feature spec blocks (F-SPEECH, F-CLAUDE, F-ACTIONS) embedded in CLAUDE.md are stale and should be trimmed. Doing this before Phase 3 would reduce context overhead and unlock caching on the stable sections.

recommendations.title: CLAUDE.md context bloat from completed feature specs
recommendations.body: CLAUDE.md now embeds full spec blocks for F-SPEECH, F-CLAUDE, and F-ACTIONS — all completed features. These add ~3,000–4,000 tokens of context overhead on every turn with no benefit. Removing or archiving these blocks to the feature folders would bring CLAUDE.md back to a lean active-session document. This is the single highest-leverage cleanup before Phase 3.

forecast_narrative: Phase 3 has 4 tasks remaining — error state audit, full smoke test across all states and modes, build verification (.dmg on Apple Silicon), and distribution prep. These are review and testing tasks with minimal code writes. Based on the Phase 1 review ($0.25) and short build sessions ($0.20), expect $0.25–0.40 to complete Phase 3. Total project cost will land at $4.70–4.90 — well under $5 for a fully shipped v1.
